description: Centralized ETL business rules extracted from 9 ETL scripts. Single source of truth for category classifications, keyword mappings, and domain constants.

categories._benefit_eligible_note: Canonical list resolving divergence between workforce (F12,F09,F10,F11,...) and demographics (F12,F11,F09,F10,...) scripts. Same values, alphabetical order within prefix groups.
categories._house_staff_note: HSP/HSR are ALSO benefit-eligible (isBenefitEligible=true). They appear here as a separate category for classification but share benefit eligibility with the benefit_eligible list.
categories._special_note: Original SPECIAL_CATEGORIES from workforce script. Union of house_staff + temp.

person_types._note: When person type is unrecognized but assignment category is benefit-eligible, defaults to 'staff'.

locations._note: If location string contains 'phoenix' (case-insensitive), classify as phoenix; otherwise omaha.

grade_codes._note: Grade codes starting with 'R' are classified as house_staff (hsp type), benefit-eligible.

termination_reasons._default_category_note: If no category keywords match, defaults to voluntary (is_voluntary=true).

mobility_actions._note: Keywords matched against combined (action + ' ' + reason).toLowerCase(). First match wins.

deviation_defaults._note: Fallback averages used when no is_average=true row is found in Staff_Deviation/Faculty_Deviation sheets.

score_normalization._note: Exit survey scores. If value is 1-5 use as-is; if 0-100, divide by 20 to convert to 1-5 scale.

boolean_parsing._note: Used in exit-surveys for would_recommend, conduct_concerns fields.

fiscal_year._note: Fiscal year runs July 1 to June 30. FY2025 = July 2024 - June 2025.

defaults._default_period_date_note: Demographics script defaults to this when no date specified.
defaults._employee_type_note: New hires default to STAFF when employee_type not provided.
defaults._location_default_note: New hires default to OMA when location not provided.
defaults._ethnicity_note: Demographics uses 'Not Disclosed' when ethnicity is null/empty.
